bead.title: test-scrub: make the server worker-exit wait deterministic and bounded (30s -> ~5s)
bead.description:
PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE: internal/server/workers_resolve_route_test.go:174 waits up to 30*time.Second (waitForWorkerExit, internal/server/workers_test.go:282, 50ms poll). On the resolveRouteFailingService error path it burned the full 30s and FAILED under load. The worker should reach FinishedAt promptly on a failed route.

PROPOSED FIX: Confirm the failing-route worker path sets FinishedAt deterministically; reduce the deadline to ~5s and/or replace polling with a completion signal/channel from the WorkerManager. Do NOT change the assertion that ResolveRoute is never called for a pinned profile/model.

NON-SCOPE: keep the routinglint ResolveRoute-not-called assertion intact.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestWorkerExecutionDoesNotCallResolveRouteForPinnedProfileOrModel completes <5s and passes deterministically (run -count=3).
2. It still asserts ResolveRoute was not invoked â€” coverage preserved.
3. cd cli && go test -run TestWorkerExecutionDoesNotCallResolveRouteForPinnedProfileOrModel -count=3 ./internal/server/ green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
